Explainings.powershell.exe: System advanced command prompt. Can be used to run, install and hide malware.
Explainings.cmd.exe: System command prompt. Can be used to run, install and hide malware.
Explainings.nmap.exe: Port and network scanner. Can be used to map the target machine's network and make lateral movements.
Explainings.nc.exe: TCP connections tool. Can be used to make connections between a victim and the attacker.
Explainings.nc64.exe: TCP connections tool. Can be used as to make connections between a victim and the attacker.
Explainings.MsMpEng.exe: Core Windows Defender antivirus engine. Runs continuously in real-time to detect and block malware.
Explainings.NisSrv.exe: Network Inspection Service. Monitors network traffic for exploit attempts and malicious connections.
Explainings.SecurityHealthService.exe: Windows Security Center service. Monitors antivirus, firewall, and overall system health status.
Explainings.SenseCE.exe: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint component. Handles endpoint detection and response (EDR) capabilities.
Explainings.SenseCM.exe: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint configuration manager. Manages security policy enforcement.
Explainings.SenseIR.exe: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint incident response. Handles automated investigation and remediation.
Explainings.SenseNdr.exe: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint network detection. Analyzes network traffic for threats.
Explainings.SenseSampleUploader.exe: Uploads suspicious file samples to Microsoft cloud for advanced analysis.
Explainings.SenseScheduler.exe: Manages scheduled tasks for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint telemetry and scans.
Explainings.MpDlpService.exe: Data Loss Prevention service. Prevents unauthorized exfiltration of sensitive data.
Explainings.MpEngine.exe: Windows Defender antimalware scanning engine. Executes signature-based and heuristic detection.
Explainings.MpRTP.exe: Real-time protection module. Monitors file system, registry, and process activity continuously.
Explainings.MpSvc.exe: Windows Defender service host. Coordinates all antivirus and antimalware operations.
Explainings.WdNisSvc.exe: Windows Defender Network Inspection Service. Detects network-based exploits and intrusions.
Explainings.mssense.exe: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint sensor. Collects telemetry and behavioral data from the system.
Explainings.mssenseworker.exe: Worker process for Defender sensor. Handles data processing and event correlation.
Explainings.mssenseuploader.exe: Uploads telemetry and detected threat data to Microsoft Defender for Endpoint cloud.
